hints.title: Gentle nudge

explanation: This June 25 Wend entry keeps the MVP daily update flow current while the verified real puzzle data is pending. Replace it with the checked answer set before public launch.
quickHint: Start with the top edge path.
fastTip: Confirm the obvious horizontal paths first, then compare the remaining row letters.
commonMistake: Do not treat this unverified placeholder as a final public answer.
difficultyNote: Medium placeholder difficulty until the real June 25 puzzle is verified.
